description: Owkin develops AI products for biomedical research, including K Pro for scientific reasoning over datasets and Pathology Explorer for analyzing histology slides. Its public docs focus on life-science research workflows and integrations with enterprise data systems.
summary: Owkin publicly documents one MCP server at `https://mcp.k.owkin.com/mcp` (streamable HTTP); its docs mention planned REST/API surfaces but do not publish concrete endpoints, specs, or usable authentication mechanics yet.
